title: cereaster grandiflorus
intro: Cereaster grandiflorus, also known as Caltrop or Caltrops, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Capparaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat inflammation, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Cereaster grandiflorus is often prepared as a herbal tea or supplement, and can also be found in various Ayurvedic formulations, such as capsules or powders.
